skills.description: Generate a complete set of favicons from the source image at `$1` and update the project's HTML with the appropriate link tags.
trigger_conditions: Need to generate favicons for a web project
Source image provided for favicon generation
anti_triggers: Favicon generation already complete and no changes needed

skills.description: Extensive icon library and AI-driven icon generation skill for premium UI/UX design.
trigger_conditions: Designing or building highly crafted navigation menus
Need for an icon that is part of a cohesive
perfectly styled icon using Iconsax AI when a unique concept is required.

skills.description: AI image generation skill powered by Google Gemini that enables seamless visual content creation for UI placeholders, documentation, and design assets.
trigger_conditions: Frontend development requires placeholder or actual images

skills.description: AI-powered animation tool for creating motion in logos, UI, icons, and social media assets.
trigger_conditions: Adding life to a static logo or brand mark
anti_triggers: Creating chaotic or overly fast motion
